First check: if total gas < total cost, it's impossible. No starting point will work.
If you start at station A and can't reach station B, then no station between A and B can be a valid start either.
Use a greedy approach: track current surplus. When it goes negative, reset the start to the next station.
A single pass is enough: track totalSurplus (feasibility check) and currentSurplus (to find the start point).
